title: [feature] Run using local models via LM Studio
author: hsousa
body:
## What's the problem

I can't run Harness if I'm in an offline environment, or am online but don't want to pay for API access to an LLM provider when I have a surplus of unified memory and am not in a hurry to get fast results. 😅

## What you'd like

I'd love to hook up Harness and [LM Studio](https://lmstudio.ai/). The latter can be run as a server and expose OpenAI-compatible v1 API endpoints, but in all honesty I haven't yet explored Harness's codebase to understand if it needs something LM Studio doesn't provide.

## Why this fits Harness

I think running Harness completely locally, fits perfectly in its feature set differentiator against commercial solutions.

## Alternatives considered

Nothing, really. I learned about this project and thought it would be an interesting feature to consider/discuss.

## Anything else

Absolutely love this idea, thank you for making it FOSS and giving back to the developer community ❤️

title: [bug] Hard-coded user path
author: impiri
body: ## What happened In the initial setup screen, trying to build the WebDriverAgent looks for the `/Users/alanwizemann` directory. ## Environment - macOS version: 26.5 - Harness version / commit SHA: 0.2.0 (1) ## Expected Some sort of "building..." message. ## Actual ## Reproduction Launch the app (unless you are specifically Alan Wizemann) ## Anything else This looks great! I'm very excited to see where this project goes.
